name: 𝑺𝒐𝒄𝒊𝒆𝒕𝒚 𝑪𝒐𝒍𝒍𝒂𝒑𝒔𝒆
description:
Version 1.2

By the 2030s, the United States finds itself in a precarious position. Decades of fiscal mismanagement, widening wealth inequality, hyper-partisan politics, and overextended global commitments create a fragile foundation. When multiple crises converge, the economic system collapses, and government institutions falter, plunging the nation into chaos. will you survive? or Perish?

When creating your character, with species if it is a anthropomorphic animal, please end it with for example; if a wolf "furry" then Wolf morph.


Constructive criticism is encouraged, so if you don't mind please leave truthful reviews.

Warning: Maybe Controversial, i do not condone actions against someone from another political party, i also don't think this is the most accurate representation of a societal collapse in the USA. (BE WARNED)
creator: Alice_steele
